Usage: [OPTIONS] [project]

Positionals:
  project dir                 Project to open or create on startup.

Options:
  -h,--help                   Print this help message and exit
  --read-only                 Prevents Editor from modifying any project files, unless it is explicitly requested via user command.
  --single-process            Prevents Editor from spawning additional processes, unless it is explicitly requested via user command.
  --command command           Command to execute on startup.
  --exit                      Forces Editor to exit after command execution.
  --plugin TEXT               Path to plugin file.
  --headless                  Do not initialize graphics subsystem
  --validate-shaders          Validate shaders before submitting them to GAPI
  --nolimit                   Disable frame limiter
  --landscape                 Force landscape orientation
  --portrait                  Force portrait orientation
  --nosound                   Disable sound
  --noip                      Disable sound interpolation
  --speakermode int           Force sound speaker output mode (default is automatic)
  --nothreads                 Disable multithreading
  -v,--vsync                  Enable vsync
  -w,--windowed               Windowed mode
  -f,--full-screen            Full screen mode
  --borderless                Borderless window mode
  -s,--resizable              Enable window resizing
  -q,--quiet                  Disable logging
  -l,--log string in {trace|debug|info|warn|error}
                              Logging level
  --log-file string           Log output file
  -x,--width int              Window width
  -y,--height int             Window height
  --monitor int               Create window on the specified monitor
  --hz int                    Use custom refresh rate
  -m,--multisample int        Multisampling samples
  -b,--sound-buffer int       Sound buffer size
  -r,--mix-rate int           Sound mixing rate
  --pp,--prefix-paths path1;path2;... (Env:URHO3D_PREFIX_PATH)
                              Resource prefix paths
  --pr,--resource-paths path1;path2;...
                              Resource paths
  --pf,--resource-packages path1;path2;...
                              Resource packages
  --ap,--autoload-paths path1;path2;...
                              Resource autoload paths
  --cn,--config-name filename Config name
  --tq int {0-15}             Texture quality
  --tf string in {nearest|bilinear|trilinear|anisotropic|nearest-anisotropic|default}
                              Texture filter mode
  --af int                    Use anisotropic filtering
  --touch                     Enable touch emulation
  --timeout int               Quit application after specified time
  --plugins plugin1;plugin2;...
                              Plugins to be loaded
  --main plugin               Plugin to be treated as main entry point
  --log-shader-sources        Log shader sources into shader cache directory
  --discard-shader-cache      Discard all cached shader bytecode and logged shader sources
  --no-save-shader-cache      Disable saving shader bytecode to cache directory
  --xr                        Launch the engine in XR mode
  --d3d11                     Use Direct3D11 rendering backend
  --d3d12                     Use Direct3D12 rendering backend
  --opengl                    Use OpenGL rendering backend
  --vulkan                    Use Vulkan rendering backend
